endpoints.name: Erebos, God of the Dead (new sub-node, child of theros-pantheon)
Theros Pantheon (parent — updated related_characters + appears_on + caveat-sync)
Fruit of Tizerus (THB-96) — flavor-direct Erebos attribution

description: Oh, sir — please forgive the upgrade in scope. I was meant to do a fresh corpus walk and the walk surfaced something the parent pantheon's own caveats have been understating for several waves. The parent node's Caveat lists Erebos at '1+ via Tizerus' but on careful audit the corpus actually carries four substantively-attributed Erebos anchors: Fruit of Tizerus THB-96 (flavor-direct 'palace of Erebos'), Mindwrack Harpy THB-276 (trivia-canonical 'Harpies on Theros are servants of Erebos'), Grim Physician THB-100 (trivia-canonical 'Erebos's realm' attribution + Returned-typology), and Towering-Wave Mystic THB-77 (flavor cross-domain Nerono-river-of-Erebos AND its Connections bullet already explicitly left a future-watch note 'no Thassa or Erebos solo sub-node currently exists in the BBL graph' — a prior Edgelord pass was already flagging this gap for resolution). Reverent Hoplite's Connections bullet leaves a parallel Heliod-watch note. Threshold of ≥3 substantive anchors clears cleanly at 4. I've drafted the sub-node MD at cards/_characters/erebos.md mirroring the mogis / nylea / iroas structures exactly (parent_character: theros-pantheon, BLOCK form YAML, ip_resolution_for stamped, related_hubs: [labor] because Wizards-published Final Death THB-95 flavor canonicalizes the realm as identity-extraction-apparatus at planar scale — sibling-counterweight to mogis at the labor hub, completing the apparatus-of-extraction two-pole structure at cult-scale and cosmic-scale within the same pantheon). Wired backrefs cleanly: parent's related_characters extended [mogis, nylea, iroas] -> [mogis, nylea, iroas, erebos]; parent's appears_on extended with Mindwrack Harpy + Grim Physician (Soulreaper precedent — both parent and sub-node carry the appears_on entries when a card is dual-attached); parent's first Caveat updated with current sub-node roster and revised remaining-pantheon-corpus-depth tally; mogis sub-node's related_characters extended to include erebos as the designer-coordinated apparatus-pair sibling; Erebos's own related_characters narrowed to [theros-pantheon, mogis] per the same designer-coordinated-pair discipline mogis uses (theros-pantheon + iroas-twin); all 4 anchor cards' characters: frontmatter extended from {theros-pantheon or absent} -> [theros-pantheon, erebos] in BLOCK form; Connections bullets added on Mindwrack Harpy and Grim Physician (had no Connections section previously); Connections bullet upgraded on Towering-Wave Mystic from theros-pantheon-only to erebos-primary (wikilink-vs-backtick discipline per wave-195 — the most-specific cohort gets the wikilink, parent goes in backticks); Connections section on Fruit of Tizerus extended with a second bullet for the erebos sub-node attachment (kept the existing pantheon bullet intact because the prior bullet has detailed prose already and the Soulreaper precedent of two-bullet Connections-when-card-was-prewired-at-parent is the cleanest pattern for the upgrade). Heliod sub-node deferred — 2-3 anchors currently, Glory Bearers THB-17 enrichment will likely push it over threshold; Athreos third-deferred; all noted in the updated parent Caveat. Thank you for letting me upgrade scope, sir.

[Scryfall: thb/96 flavor_text — 'outside the palace of Erebos']
[Scryfall: thb/276 flavor_text + trivia citation: MTG Wiki Theros harpies page — 'Harpies on Theros are servants of Erebos']
[Scryfall: thb/100 flavor_text + trivia citation: MTG Wiki Returned page — 'crafted from gold, the most common material in Erebos's realm']
[Scryfall: thb/77 flavor_text — 'Even the waves of Nerono obeyed his will' + prior-pass Connections-body future-watch note]

[Scryfall: thb/95 flavor_text — 'The Underworld erodes memory, identity, and eventually the physical form' (Final Death — vision-passed, pre-flagged in node Caveats as next likely anchor pending trivia-pass)]
[Wizards of the Coast: Mark Rosewater Making Magic columns, Theros design 2013-2014 + 2020 THB-return]
[Wizards of the Coast: Theros Beyond Death Story Summary, 2020-01-10 — Heliod-and-Erebos-against-Elspeth canonical rebellion-target arc]
[parent node theros-pantheon.md Caveats section: 'Erebos (1+ via Tizerus)' line predated this commission and was outdated per the wave-92 mogis-precedent / wave-93 nylea-precedent]

[card thb/33 (Reverent Hoplite) Connections-body parallel future-watch: 'no Heliod solo sub-node currently exists in the BBL graph; parent caveats note Heliod as next-watch sub-node candidate at 1-2 anchors']

anchor_audit.threshold: >=3 substantive anchors per the rigor protocol established at the mogis / nylea / iroas commissions

erebos_cross_domain_river_named_in_flavo: thb/77-towering-wave-mystic ('Even the waves of Nerono obeyed his will' — Nerono is canonically one of the five rivers of Erebos's Underworld per MTG Wiki Theros Underworld page)
erebos_servitor_class_trivia_canonical: thb/276-mindwrack-harpy ('Harpies on Theros are servants of Erebos, god of the dead, dispatched to torment the living and the recently deceased' — trivia citation of MTG Wiki Theros harpies page)
erebos_realm_typology_trivia_canonical: thb/100-grim-physician ('the most common material in Erebos's realm' — trivia citation of MTG Wiki Returned page; Returned typology IS canonically Erebos-realm-escapee evidence)

anchor_audit.borderline_anchor: thb/77-towering-wave-mystic — Erebos named in flavor only via the Nerono river-co-reference with Thassa; the depicted figure is a Thassa-blessed merfolk wizard, not an Erebos-servitor. Same evidence-tier as Opaline Unicorn at the nylea sub-node (Nylea named in flavor only as love-object of Purphoros's pantheon-internal-romance backstory). Precedent-cleared by parent node's flavor-text-attribution-only first-class-membership caveat. Dual-attribution at both Erebos and Thassa(-parent-pantheon) cohorts is acceptable per Pharika-and-Nylea-share-Moss-Viper precedent.
anchor_audit.depiction_uncertainty_anchor: thb/276-mindwrack-harpy — the depicted harpy is canonically Erebos-cult per Wizards-published MTG Wiki lore (cited in trivia), but no god is named in the card's flavor. Treating as strong anchor on Wizards-canonical-lore-citation evidence-tier; same precedent-class as Kragma Warcaller at the mogis sub-node (depicted minotaurs are canonically Mogis-servitors per Wizards-published lore even though Mogis is not flavor-named on the card).
anchors_pending_trivia_pass: thb/95-final-death — vision-passed only; vision body names Erebos and the realm as identity-extraction-apparatus; flavor canonical: 'The Underworld erodes memory, identity, and eventually the physical form, leaving only crumbling statues called misera — hollow monuments to mortal futility.' Pre-flagged in node Caveats as next likely anchor.

files_modified: cards/_characters/erebos.md (NEW — full sub-node MD with frontmatter, body, appears_on, canonical sources, caveats, see-also)

cards/_characters/theros-pantheon.md (parent — related_characters extended [mogis, nylea, iroas] -> [mogis, nylea, iroas, erebos]; appears_on extended with thb/276-mindwrack-harpy + thb/100-grim-physician; rendered Appears-on wikilink block extended; first Caveat updated with current sub-node roster + revised remaining-pantheon-corpus-depth tally + revised next-watch candidate priority [Heliod / Athreos])
cards/_characters/mogis.md (sibling sub-node — related_characters extended [theros-pantheon, iroas] -> [theros-pantheon, iroas, erebos] as the designer-coordinated apparatus-pair-sibling reciprocal)

cards/magic-the-gathering/theros-beyond-death/96-fruit-of-tizerus.md (characters: extended [theros-pantheon] -> [theros-pantheon, erebos]; Connections section extended with second bullet for erebos-sub-node attachment; existing pantheon bullet retained — note that the prior bullet's 'Sole anchor at the parent pantheon cohort' phrasing was removed in the surgical edit since it is no longer sole-anchor)
cards/magic-the-gathering/theros-beyond-death/276-mindwrack-harpy.md (characters: NEW [theros-pantheon, erebos] in BLOCK form; Connections section NEW with single erebos-sub-node bullet)
cards/magic-the-gathering/theros-beyond-death/100-grim-physician.md (characters: NEW [theros-pantheon, erebos] in BLOCK form; Connections section NEW with single erebos-sub-node bullet)

cards/magic-the-gathering/theros-beyond-death/77-towering-wave-mystic.md (characters: extended [theros-pantheon] -> [theros-pantheon, erebos]; Connections bullet upgraded from theros-pantheon-wikilink to erebos-wikilink-primary per wave-195 wikilink-vs-backtick discipline — most-specific cohort gets wikilink, parent goes in backticks)
yaml_discipline_check: All list-typed frontmatter (characters:, related_characters:, related_hubs:, appears_on:, aliases:, tags:) written in BLOCK form per wave-92 spec amendment; no inline JSON. tags: stamped last in new node MD frontmatter per wave-92 discipline. parent_character: nested per mogis.md / nylea.md / iroas.md precedent. All 7 files YAML-parse-clean (verified via yaml.safe_load).
wikilink_discipline_check: Per memory bbl-wikilink-vs-backtick-discipline + wave-195 scope-shift rule: each Connections bullet carries exactly ONE wikilink to the most-specific cohort being attached. Mindwrack Harpy + Grim Physician: single bullet, single [[erebos]] wikilink, parent reference 'theros-pantheon' in backticks. Towering-Wave Mystic: bullet upgraded from [[theros-pantheon]] to [[erebos]] (most-specific now), parent cohort in backticks. Fruit of Tizerus: two-bullet pattern (existing pantheon bullet kept, new erebos bullet added) — Soulreaper-precedent-aligned for cards prewired at parent that gain sub-node attachment. Body-prose backticks used for all schema-precedent citations (mogis / nylea / iroas as sibling-sub-node references in node body).
hub_attribution_rationale: related_hubs: [labor] — Wizards-published Final Death THB-95 flavor 'The Underworld erodes memory, identity, and eventually the physical form' canonicalizes Erebos's realm as the apparatus-of-extraction at planar scale (canonical-flavor-text language, not BBL-interpretation). The Mindwrack Harpy 'dispatched to torment the living and the recently deceased' phrasing carries extraction-apparatus posture. The Returned typology IS Wizards-canonical evidence of identity-extraction-as-realm-output. Attaching [labor] hub completes a structurally-symmetric two-pole apparatus-of-extraction stack within the same pantheon — [[mogis]] at cult-scale (Skophos blood-tithe minotaur cult), [[erebos]] at cosmic-scale (Underworld as planar-default identity-extraction-apparatus). Per the Potion-rule sub-rule 2 ('hub-attribution must survive a canonical-citation question'): canonical citations are Final Death flavor + MTG Wiki Theros Underworld page + Theros Beyond Death Story Summary on Elspeth's escape-rebellion-against-Erebos's-claim. Deliberately NOT attaching [rebellion] (which would risk positioning Erebos as the rebel rather than the warden-being-rebelled-against; the rebellion-target framing lives in the parent pantheon's distributed-triple-attribution body section and in the Erebos node's See-also reference to the Elspeth arc).
potion_rule_compliance: Body distinguishes canonical-event from curatorial-overlay throughout. Examples: 'extraction-apparatus deity' is named as BBL bundle-copy reading; Wizards-published Final Death flavor 'The Underworld erodes memory, identity, and eventually the physical form' is named as canonical-Wizards-published-text. Caveats section explicitly states 'The Mogis-Erebos two-scale apparatus thesis is interpretive, not designer-stated' and provides the canonical-evidence anchor (Mogis-cult sacrifice-clauses-in-oracle-text + Erebos-realm-identity-extraction-in-flavor-text both Wizards-published). No claims that Wizards stated the two-scale apparatus thesis; only that Wizards's published design materials use the canonical-flavor-and-oracle-text that the apparatus-of-extraction framing translates into BBL voice. Backticks used appropriately throughout for schema-precedent references; wikilinks used only for real-thematic edges per the discipline.
other_candidates_considered: ATTACH DROWNYARD LURKER (MH3-3) to [[eldrazi]] cohort — fresh trivia just landed pre-wave; Lurker is unwired with 'eldrazi' in tags_hub and flavor 'When Emrakul arrived on Innistrad, even fossils answered her twisted call' is direct Emrakul-Innistrad-arc evidence. Considered but DEFERRED: the parent brief explicitly flagged the Eldrazi cohort just got hit hard (waves 197-202) and said 'Don't FIND-and-VERIFY known moves.' Lurker is a textbook Sonnet-override orphan-attach (parent knows the move, agent verifies and writes). Stage as next-wave Sonnet-shape: BFZ-136 Vestige of Emrakul (also unwired, also Emrakul-arc flavor 'Emrakul has not been seen in months') and EMN-11 Vexing Scuttler (Eldrazi-Crab-emerge, Eldritch-Moon-Innistrad-corruption-arc) should be batched with Drownyard Lurker for a 3-card Emrakul-Innistrad-arc Sonnet attach. Inventory still has 6+ unwired Eldrazi-tagged cards (Crumble to Dust, Molten Nursery, Nettle Drone, Vile Aggregate, Touch of the Void, Colossal Dreadmask, Propagator Drone, Unfathomable Truths, Spawnbinder Mage, Consuming Sinkhole, Eldrazi Aggressor, Maw of Kozilek, Ulamog's Crusher) — plenty for future Sonnet waves.

HELIOD sub-node commission — Erebos's canonical antagonist-coupling partner in the THB Elspeth-arc. Current corpus depth: Reverent Hoplite THB-33 (wired to pantheon, trivia Heliod-cult attribution), Daybreak Chimera THB-10 (trivia mentions Heliod's sun-domain via related-card-citation, not flavor-direct), Return to Nature THB-197 (flavor names Heliod-spear-cast-down, wired to pantheon), Glory Bearers THB-17 (flavor-direct 'sun-crowned Heliod's blessings' but card has empty tags_hub, no vision body — not yet enriched). Honestly two-and-a-half substantive anchors plus one un-enriched flavor-direct anchor. Defers below threshold; commission once Glory Bearers gets enriched OR a fourth Heliod-attribution card arrives. Pre-flagged in the updated parent Caveat as next-watch candidate.

ATHREOS sub-node commission — Athreos, God of Passage is the only printed-god-card currently in inventory (Mystery Booster Cards 146); plus Lampad of Death's Vigil THB-103 (Athreos's lampad-nymph servitor class, trivia-canonical). Two anchors, both substantive but below ≥3 threshold. Third-tier deferred candidate per the updated parent Caveat.

MOGIS-EREBOS twin-edge (explicit character-to-character mirror) — both sub-nodes now exist with 6 and 4 anchors respectively; structurally a cohort-scope designer-coordinated apparatus-of-extraction pair (cult-scale + cosmic-scale). The implicit contrast already lives in both sub-nodes' See-also sections and body-prose; the explicit edge can be drawn in a future pass when a bundle-assembly commission needs the two-scale-apparatus contrast wired. Deliberately deferred this pass: spec calls for single decision per invocation; the apparatus-pair sibling-reciprocal already lives in mogis's and erebos's related_characters frontmatter.
